mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay_date, '%Y-%m') AS sale_month, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue, COUNT(pay_no) AS order_count FROM payment WHERE pay_status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY sale_month ORDER BY sale_month;
SELECT REVIEW_NO, USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, APPROVAL_STATUS, REG_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER() AS REVIEW_WAIT, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS POST_DAY FROM REVIEW WHERE APPROVAL_STATUS = "WAIT";

SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_TYPE, CASE WHEN TARGET_TYPE = 'MEMBER' THEN TARGET_USER_ID ELSE CAST(TARGET_ID AS CHAR) END AS UNI_TARGET_ID, REPORT_TITLE, REPORT_CONTENT, ANSWER_STATUS, ACTION_STATUS, REG_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER() AS REPORT_WAIT, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REPORT_DAY FROM REPORT WHERE 1=1
AND target_type = #{targetType}
AND action_status = 0
AND action_status = 1 AND answer_status = 0
AND action_status = 1 AND answer_status = 1
ORDER BY reg_date DESC
SELECT PASS_NO, PASS_NAME, PRICE, REVIEW_CNT, IS_ACTIVE, REG_DATE FROM PASS_PRODUCT WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1
SELECT * FROM PAYMENT P INNER JOIN PAYMENT_PASS P2 ON P.PAY_NO = P2.PAY_NO WHERE PASS_NO = 1 AND PAY_STATUS = "SUCCESS" AND USER_ID = #{userId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment ( user_id, amount, pay_status, pay_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{amount}, 'SUCCESS', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inquiry WHERE 1=1 AND status = #{status} ORDER BY reg_date DESC

SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS name, U.EMAIL AS userEmail, M.STATUS AS status, M.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.ROLE AS role, CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'USER' THEN 'USER' WHEN M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER') THEN 'COMPANY' END AS targetType FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL U ON M.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE M.ROLE = 'USER'

SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, C.COM_NAME AS name, C.COM_EMAIL AS companyEmail, M.STATUS AS status, C.STATUS AS companyStatus, M.REG_DATE AS regDate, C.CEO_NAME AS ceoName, C.BIZ_NO AS bizName, C.GRADE AS grade, CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'USER' THEN 'USER' WHEN M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER') THEN 'COMPANY' END AS targetType FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON M.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER')

SELECT target_id AS targetId, target_type AS targetType, action_type AS actionType, reason, admin_id AS adminId, reg_date AS banRegDate FROM ban_history WHERE target_id = #{target_id} AND target_type = #{target_type} ORDER BY reg_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ban_history ( target_id, target_type, action_type, reason, admin_id ) VALUES ( #{target_id}, #{target_type}, #{action_type}, #{reason}, #{admin_id} )
